things.name: Altstadt
things.description: The old town, famous as the longest bar in the world, with hundreds of pubs and restaurants

things.name: Kunstsammlung NRW
things.description: Two world-class museums (K20 and K21) with Klee, Mondrian and contemporary art

things.name: Medienhafen
things.description: Striking media harbour with iconic Frank Gehry buildings and waterfront restaurants

things.name: Konigsallee
things.description: Elegant tree-lined boulevard with luxury boutiques along a canal

things.name: Rheinturm
things.description: 240-metre communication tower with revolving restaurant and observation deck

things.name: Hofgarten
things.description: Oldest public park in the Rhineland, a neoclassical English landscape garden

things.name: Benrath Palace
things.description: Elegant 18th-century rococo pleasure palace with magnificent formal gardens

things.name: Carlsplatz Market
things.description: Vibrant food market with organic produce, flowers and local delicacies

things.name: Aquazoo Lowenbruch
things.description: Zoo and aquarium with sharks, crocodiles and Europe's largest aquarium tunnel

things.name: Dusseldorf Carnival
things.description: Famous Rose Monday parade, one of Germany's largest carnival celebrations
